final_choice.row_label: Current interest liabilities to related parties

variables.notes: R:c. No clean non-lease short-term debt/current maturities line is clearly identified. 'Current interest liabilities to related parties' may be financing-related, but wording is too ambiguous for confident inclusion in STD.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label corresponding to property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset gross amount, narrower than total PPE and lease-related.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist preference for a cleaner total tangible asset/PPE-style line. Although preview values are blank, semantically this is the best PPE match and should not be rejected for blanks.
